steps.title: Identify the sequence
steps.content: The passage describes a rocket failure, then the CEO's response to it. The transition word must mark: what happened next.

steps.title: Match the sequence marker
steps.content:
”Afterward” directly marks what happened next—the CEO's response follows the failure.

The other choices either add to a list (“Additionally”), confirm something (“Indeed”), or indicate similarity (“Similarly”), none of which establish the time relationship between events.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
